common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define.content: Use this API to fetch the accounting detail of order.

children.data: Use this API to fetch the accounting detail of order.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: Invalid promotion ID. The promotion may have been recently added and not mapped to the system yet. Please raise a ticket on Open Platform for further verification.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: The information you queried is not found.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: Missing order_sn. Please include a valid order_sn to get escrow details.

error_list.name: order_not_found
error_list.description: Order SN provided is invalid or does not belong to you. Please enter a valid Order SN.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: The request body is not a valid json format

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: Invalid or missing page_size parameter , please enter a valid value that is with 1-100, indicating the number of records within a page.

error_list.name: common.error_not_found
error_list.description: supplier order item income not found

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: partner_id is invalid

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: The App is deleted, and you'll be unable to make any API call.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: App developer’s permissions for authorizations have been restricted. If you’re a seller, contact the developer for more information. If you’re the developer, refer to the Open Platform Console for details.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: There is no partner_id in query.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Invalid partner_id.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: no timestamp

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Invalid timestamp

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: There is no sign in query.

common_error_list.name: error_sign
common_error_list.description: Wrong sign.

common_error_list.name: invalid_partner_id
common_error_list.description: Invalid partner_id, please have a check.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: No permission to current api.

common_error_list.name: error_api_call_restricted
common_error_list.description: The App permission for api call have been restricted. If you’re a seller, contact the developer for more information. If you’re the developer, refer to the Open Platform Console for details.

common_error_list.name: api_suspended
common_error_list.description: The API is offline. Please call v2 API instead.

common_error_list.name: error_limit
common_error_list.description: The total API call number made by your APP has reached the daily API call limit, please try again after 00: 00 (UTC+08:00)

common_error_list.name: error_rate_limit
common_error_list.description: Too many requests. You have reached the rate limit. Please try again later.

common_error_list.name: source_ip_undeclared
common_error_list.description: Request Source IP ({ip}) is undeclared. Please declare all your IP addresses in the Shopee Open Platform Console > App list > IP Address Whitelist

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Permission denied. This API is currently offline or the request path is incorrect.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Partner_id is invalid, should be an integer between 0 and 4294967295.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: no timestamp.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Timestamp is invalid, should be an integer between 0 and 4294967295.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Timestamp is expired.

common_error_list.name: error_partner_key_expired
common_error_list.description: Your API partner key has expired, please reset the Live API Partner Key in Console to get a new valid partner key to call open api.

common_error_list.name: error_api_permission
common_error_list.description: This app type has no permission to this API.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: There is no access_token in query.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: Invalid access_token.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: Invalid partner_id or shopid.

common_error_list.name: shop_no_linked
common_error_list.description: Partner and shop has no linked.

common_error_list.name: shop_banned
common_error_list.description: The shop account has been banned. Permissions for shop authorization and API calls have been suspended until the shop account is restored.

common_error_list.name: invalid_acceess_token
common_error_list.description: Invalid access_token, please have a check.

common_error_list.name: partner_shop_no_link
common_error_list.description: Invalid partner_id or shop_id, please have a check.

common_error_list.name: error_ashop_api_permission

common_error_list.name: error_kyc_auth
common_error_list.description: No permission. Please inform the seller to complete the Seller Registration on Shopee Seller Center first, then this shop can call for this API.

common_error_list.name: error_param

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: shop_id is invalid, should be an integer between 0 and 4294967295.

request_params.name: order_sn
request_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for an order.

children.name: order_sn
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for an order.

children.name: buyer_user_name
children.description: The username of buyer.

children.name: return_order_sn_list
children.description: The list of the serial number of return.

children.name: escrow_amount
children.description:
The total amount that the seller is expected to receive for the order and will change before order is completed. 

For non cb sip affiliate shop (new formula): 

escrow_amount= original_cost_of_goods_sold-original_shopee_discount+seller_return_refund+ shopee_discount- voucher_from_seller- seller_coin_cash_back+ buyer_paid_shipping_fee- actual_shipping_fee+ shopee_shipping_rebate+ shipping_fee_discount_from_3pl- reverse_shipping_fee+ rsf_seller_protection_fee_claim_amount- final_return_to_seller_shipping_fee- seller_transaction_fee- service_fee- commission_fee- campaign_fee- shipping_seller_protection_fee_amount- delivery_seller_protection_fee_premium_amount-final_escrow_product_gst- order_ams_commission_fee- escrow_tax-sales_tax_on_lvg-reverse_shipping_fee_sst-shipping_fee_sst-withholding_tax-overseas_return_service_fee-vat_on_imported_goods - withholding_vat_tax - withholding_pit_tax - seller_order_processing_fee + buyer_paid_packaging_fee - trade_in_bonus_by_seller - fbs_fee - ads_escrow_top_up_fee_or_technical_support_fee - th_import_duty


For cb sip affiliate shop: escrow_amount=escrow_amount_pri * exchange_rate


note: Return refund amount = if adjustable RR, will equal to drc_adjustable_refund

children.name: buyer_total_amount
children.description: The snapshot value of total amount that paid by buyer at checkout moment.
The original price of the item before ANY promotion/discount in the listing currency. It returns the subtotal of that specific item if quantity exceeds 1.
children.name: order_original_price
original_price
children.description: The original price of the item before ANY promotion/discount in the listing currency. It returns the subtotal of that specific item if quantity exceeds 1.
The total discounted price for this order. It returns the subtotal of that specific item if quantity exceeds 1. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )
children.name: order_discounted_price

children.description: This field value = sum of item unit price.selling price comes from the sum up of each item's unit price. For non-bundle deal case, this value will be same like order_original_price; For bundle deal case, this value will be price of sum of item price before bundle deal promo but after item promo.It returns the subtotal of that specific item if quantity exceeds 1. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )
children.name: order_selling_price

children.description: The total discount seller provided for this order. It returns the subtotal of that specific item if quantity exceeds 1. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )
children.name: order_seller_discount

children.description: The deposit fee paid by buyer of $0.10 per container as part of the SG Beverage Container Return Scheme mandated by the National Environment Agency (NEA). This value might be updated after RR/cancellation.
children.name: bcrs_deposit
seller_discount
children.description: Final sum of each item seller discount of a specific order. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: shopee_discount
children.description: Final sum of each item Shopee discount of a specific order. This amount will Return remaining rebate value to seller. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate order. )

children.name: voucher_from_seller
children.description: Final value of voucher provided by Seller for the order. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: voucher_from_shopee
children.description: Final value of voucher provided by Shopee for the order. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: coins
children.description: This value indicates the total amount offset when the buyer consumed Shopee Coins upon checkout. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: buyer_paid_shipping_fee
children.description: The shipping fee paid by buyer. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: buyer_transaction_fee
children.description: Tansaction fee paid by buyer for the order. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: cross_border_tax
children.description: Amount incurred by Buyer for purchasing items outside of home country or region. Amount may change after Return Refund. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: payment_promotion
children.description: The amount offset via payment promotion. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: commission_fee
children.description:
The commission fee charged by Shopee platform if applicable. 


For cb sip affiliate shop: commission_fee=commission_fee_pri * exchange_rate

children.name: service_fee
children.description:
Amount charged by Shopee to seller for additional services.


For cb sip affiliate shop: service_fee=service_fee_pri * exchange_rate


For tw shop, there will be pre-order service fee included

children.name: seller_transaction_fee
children.description: Tansaction fee paid by seller for the order. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: seller_lost_compensation
children.description: Compensation to seller in case of lost parcel. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: seller_coin_cash_back
children.description: Value of coins provided by Seller for purchasing with his or her store for the order. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: escrow_tax
children.description: Cross-border tax imposed by the Indonesian government on sellers. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: estimated_shipping_fee
children.description: The estimated shipping fee is an estimation calculated by Shopee based on specific logistics courier's standard. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: final_shipping_fee
children.description: Final adjusted amount that seller has to bear as part of escrow. This amount could be negative or positive. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: actual_shipping_fee
children.description: The final shipping cost of order and it is positive. For Non-integrated logistics channel is 0. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

The Service Tax charged on Seller Paid Shipping Fee for forward shipping, based on Malaysia SST regulations for shipping fees on all orders. Definition of Seller Paid Shipping Fee is Actual Shipping Fee subtracted by sum of Shipping Fee Paid by Buyer and Shipping Rebate From Shopee. (Only applicable for non cb sip affiliate shop)
children.name: shipping_fee_sst

children.description: For CB shop, display weight used to calculate actual_shipping_fee for this order.
children.name: order_chargeable_weight
shopee_shipping_rebate
children.description: The platform shipping subsidy to the seller. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: shipping_fee_discount_from_3pl
children.description: The discount of shipping fee from 3PL. Currently only applicable to ID. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: seller_shipping_discount
children.description: The shipping discount defined by seller. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: seller_voucher_code
children.description: The list of voucher code provided by seller. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: drc_adjustable_refund
children.description: The adjustable refund amount from Shopee Dispute Resolution Center.

children.name: cost_of_goods_sold
children.description: Final amount paid by the buyer for the items in a specific order. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: original_cost_of_goods_sold
children.description: Amount paid by the buyer for the items in a specific order. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: original_shopee_discount
children.description: Sum of each item Shopee discount of a specific order. This amount will return initial rebate value (i.e. remaining Shopee Item Rebate + remaining Shopee PIX Rebate) to seller. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate order. )

children.name: seller_return_refund
children.description: Amount returned to Seller in the event of Partial Return.

children.name: items
item_id
children.description: ID of item

children.name: item_name
children.description: Name of item

children.name: item_sku
children.description: A item SKU (stock keeping unit) is an identifier defined by a seller, sometimes called parent SKU. Item SKU can be assigned to an item in Shopee Listings.

children.name: model_id
children.description: ID of the model that belongs to the same item.

children.name: model_name
children.description: Name of the model that belongs to the same item. A seller can offer variations of the same item. For example, the seller could create a fixed-priced listing for a t-shirt design and offer the shirt in different colors and sizes. In this case, each color and size combination is a separate variation. Each variation can have a different quantity and price.

children.name: model_sku
children.description: A model SKU (stock keeping unit) is an identifier defined by a seller. It is only intended for the seller's use. Many sellers assign a SKU to an item of a specific type, size, and color, which are variations of one item in Shopee Listings.

children.name: original_price
children.description: The original price of the item before ANY promotion/discount in the listing currency. It returns the subtotal of that specific item if quantity exceeds 1.
The agreed settlement price of items used as settlement basis, amount is in the primary currency. (Only display for CB SIP affiliate shop.)
children.name: original_price_pri

children.description: For non-bundle deal case, this value will be same like item original_price; For bundle deal case, this value will be price of sum of item price before bundle deal promo but after item promo. It returns the subtotal of that specific item if quantity exceeds 1 (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop.)
children.name: selling_price
discounted_price
children.description: The after-discount price of the item in the listing currency. It returns the subtotal of that specific item if quantity exceeds 1. If there is no discount, this value will be the same as that of original_price.

The deposit fee paid by buyer of $0.10 per container as part of the SG Beverage Container Return Scheme mandated by the National Environment Agency (NEA). This will be an initial value and will not update after RR/cancellation.
children.name: bcrs_deposit

children.description: The discount provided by seller for this item
children.name: seller_discount

children.description: Final sum of each item Shopee discount of a specific order. This amount will return remaining rebate value (i.e. remaining Shopee Item Rebate + remaining Shopee PIX Rebate) to seller. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate order. )
children.name: shopee_discount
discount_from_coin
children.description: The offset of this item when the buyer consumed Shopee Coins upon checkout. In case of bundle deal item, this value will return 0. Due to technical restriction, this field will return incorrect value under bundle deal case if we don’t configure it to 0.

children.name: discount_from_voucher_shopee
children.description: The offset of this item when the buyer use Shopee voucher.

children.name: discount_from_voucher_seller
children.description: The offset of this item when the buyer use seller-specific voucher.

children.name: activity_type
children.description: The type of the item, default is "". If the item is a bundle item the value is "bundle_deal", and if a add on deal item, the value is "add_on_deal"

children.name: activity_id
children.description: If bundle_deal the is id of bundle deal, if add_on_deal this is id of add on deal.

children.name: is_main_item
children.description: Meaning a main or sub item for add_on_deal.

children.name: quantity_purchased
children.description: This value indicates the number of identical items purchased at the same time by the same buyer from one listing/item.
Indicates whether this is a B2C owned item.
children.name: is_b2c_shop_item

children.description: The amount of affiliate commission fee. Applicable for items sold via the Affiliate Program.
children.name: ams_commission_fee

children.description: Indicates if this item is a kit. (only for BR local seller)
children.name: is_kit

children.description: only applicable for BR local seller
children.name: kit_items

children.description: The merchant item identifier of the product within the kit (only for BR local seller)
children.name: mt_item_id

children.description: The merchant product model of the item within the kit. (only for BR local seller)
children.name: mt_model_id

children.description: The quantity of this specific component within the kit. (only for BR local seller)
children.name: total_qty

children.description: The price of the item when it is listed as a standalone item. (only for BR local seller)
children.name: parent_item_price

children.description: The price of the item when it is listed within the kit (i.e. proportionally distributed) (only for BR local seller)
children.name: item_price_prorated

children.description:
Indicates the type of item- or package-level promotion applied to a product. Each item can be associated with at most one item promotion and one package promotion at a time.

Item Promotions:

low_price_promotion

deep_discount

platform_sale

seller_discount

flash_sale

wholesale

welcome_package_free_gift

brand_flash_sale

in_shop_flash_sale

synced_promo

platform_streaming_price

seller_streaming_price

exclusive_streamer_price

price_bidding_with_rebate

price_bidding_without_rebate

seller_advisor_price

selling_price

settlement_price

campaign_settlement_price

local_sip_settlement_price

platform_exclusive_price

seller_exclusive_price

seller_member_exclusive_sku

item_price

order_sync_price


Package Promotions:
bundle_deal
add_on_deal_main
add_on_deal_sub
children.name: promotion_type

children.description: Represents the unique identifier of a specific promotion applied to an item. Each promotion_id corresponds to a distinct promotion rule or campaign, defined under a particular promotion_type. The value is expressed in a numeric string format.
children.name: promotion_id

children.description: This object contains the detailed breakdown for all the items in this order, including regular items(non-activity) and activity items.

children.name: escrow_amount_pri
children.description: The total amount in the prim currency that the seller is expected to receive for the order and will change before order completed . escrow_amount_pri=original_price_pri-seller_return_refund_pri-commission_fee_pri-service_fee_pri-drc_adjustable_refund_pri.(Only display for cb sip affiliate order. )

children.name: buyer_total_amount_pri
children.description: The total amount that paid by buyer in the primary currency. (Only display for cb sip affiliate order. )

children.name: original_price_pri
children.description: The original price of the item before ANY promotion/discount in the primary currency. It returns the subtotal of that specific item if quantity exceeds 1.(Only display for cb sip affiliate order. )

children.name: seller_return_refund_pri
children.description: Amount returned to Seller in the event of Partial Return in the primary currency. (Only display for cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: commission_fee_pri
children.description: The commission fee charged by Shopee platform if applicable in the primary currency. (Only display for cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: service_fee_pri
children.description: Amount charged by Shopee to seller for additional services in the primary currency. (Only display for cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: drc_adjustable_refund_pri
children.description: The adjustable refund amount from Shopee Dispute Resolution Center in the primary currency after proration. (Only applicable for cb sip affiliate shop.)

children.name: pri_currency
children.description: The currency of the country or region where the shop that real seller operates. (Only display for cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: aff_currency
children.description: The currency of the country or region where shop opened in. (Only display for cb sip affiliate shop. )

children.name: exchange_rate
children.description: Exchange rate from primary shop currency to affiliate shop currency.

children.name: reverse_shipping_fee
children.description: Shopee charges the reverse shipping fee for the returned order.The value of this field will be non-negative.
The Service Tax charged on Reverse Shipping Fee for reverse shipping, based on Malaysia SST regulations for shipping fees on all orders. (Only applicable for non cb sip affiliate shop)
children.name: reverse_shipping_fee_sst
final_product_protection
children.description: The total amount of product protection purchased during placing an order.

children.name: credit_card_promotion
children.description: This value indicate the offset via credit card promotion.

children.name: credit_card_transaction_fee
children.description:
This value indicate the total transaction fee.

credit_card_transaction_fee=buyer_transaction_fee+seller_transaction_fee

children.name: final_product_vat_tax
children.description: Value-added Tax is required for online purchases based on EU Value-added Tax regulations . (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. )
Value-added Tax for product price is required for online purchases based on EU Value-added Tax regulations. (Only applicable for non cb sip affiliate shop. )
children.name: final_shipping_vat_tax

children.description: The campaign fee charged by Shopee platform. Only available for some local Indonesian shops.
children.name: campaign_fee

children.description: The SIP subsidy amount is the difference between the item settlement price set by seller and item price actually paid by buyer. (Only available for CB SIP A Shops)
children.name: sip_subsidy

children.description: The SIP subsidy amount is the difference between the item settlement price set by seller and item price actually paid by buyer. This value is in the primary currency. (Only available for CB SIP A Shops)
children.name: sip_subsidy_pri

children.description:
The insurance claim amount if seller opt in to insurance program. this covers Reverse shipping Fee in the case of RR. As per Jun 2024:
- For ID & MY Local: After Extension on coverage to FSF due to RR. this claim amount will consist of FSF + RSF claim.
- For PH local: This will only cover RSF claim

will be updated if there's any RR/cancellation
children.name: rsf_seller_protection_fee_claim_amount

children.description: Service fee charged to seller in MY,ID,PH,BR Local (as per Jun 2024) due to additional program purchased.
children.name: shipping_seller_protection_fee_amount

children.description: Goods and Service Tax for product price is required for imported goods (overseas orders) based on Singapore GST regulations. (Only applicable for non cb sip affiliate shop selling in Singapore)
children.name: final_escrow_product_gst

children.description: Goods and Service Tax for shipping fee is required for imported goods (overseas orders) based on Singapore GST regulations. (Only applicable for non cb sip affiliate shop selling in Singapore.)
children.name: final_escrow_shipping_gst

children.description: [Currently apply to ID & local orders only] An insurance premium charged to seller at the time parcel is picked up by 3PL for insurance in case of parcel lost/damaged by 3PL.
children.name: delivery_seller_protection_fee_premium_amount

children.description:
Order level adjustment transaction information.

If the order without adjustment, no returned of the field.
children.name: order_adjustment

children.description: adjustment transaction amount.
children.name: amount

children.description: adjustment transaction complete date.
children.name: date

children.description: order level adjustment transaction's currency type.
children.name: currency

children.description:
Reason for adjustment. 

Possible cases could be:

- Return Refund deduction or compensation

- logistic issue deduction or compensation

- marketing fee deduction

- payment related fee
children.name: adjustment_reason

children.description: Total adjustment made to the order.
children.name: total_adjustment_amount

children.description: Final income seller can get from this order after deduct the order-level adjustment.
children.name: escrow_amount_after_adjustment

children.description: The amount of affiliate commission fee for this order. Applicable for orders sold via the Affiliate Program.
children.name: order_ams_commission_fee

children.description: The payment method buyer used when do the order checkout.
children.name: buyer_payment_method

children.description: The instalment plan buyer chosen when do the order checkout. Only applicable when payment method support instalment.
children.name: instalment_plan

children.description: Sales Tax on Low Value Goods (LVG) is required for imported goods (overseas orders) based on Malaysia SST regulations for selective orders (e.g. CB LVG orders in MY)
children.name: sales_tax_on_lvg

children.description: The amount of fee charged to seller (if any) for the failed delivery order.
children.name: final_return_to_seller_shipping_fee

children.description:
Only for PH and ID local shops.


PH: According to regulations issued by Bureau of Internal Revenue in PH, the Withholding Tax is applied to the gross remittances sent by Shopee to online suppliers of goods and services.

ID: According to regulations issued by Directorate General of Taxation in ID, the Withholding Tax is applied to the income stated in the invoice generated via Shopee related to Seller and/or Merchants' sales in Shopee's platform.
children.name: withholding_tax

children.description: This is overseas return service fee charged to sellers who register ORS program.(Only applicable for non cb sip affiliate shop)
children.name: overseas_return_service_fee

children.description: This is the prorated value from cash equivalent of coin offset due to adjustable RR.This field will only be updated when there is an adjustable RR. If it's a full RR or normal order will response 0.
children.name: prorated_coins_value_offset_return_items

children.description: This is the prorated refund value from shopee voucher discount due to adjustable RR.This field will only be updated when there is an adjustable RR. If it's a full RR or normal order will response 0.
children.name: prorated_shopee_voucher_offset_return_items

children.description: This is the prorated refund value from seller voucher discount due to adjustable RR.This field will only be updated when there is an adjustable RR. If it's a full RR or normal order will response 0.
children.name: prorated_seller_voucher_offset_return_items

children.description: This is the prorated value from bank payment channel promo due to adjustable RR.This field will only be updated when there is an adjustable RR.If it's a full RR or normal order will response 0.
children.name: prorated_payment_channel_promo_bank_offset_return_items

children.description: This is the prorated value from shopee payment channel promo due to adjustable RR.This field will only be updated when there is an adjustable RR.If it's a full RR or normal order will response 0.
children.name: prorated_payment_channel_promo_shopee_offset_return_items

children.description: The claim amount given to seller if seller opt in to shipping fee service program. this covers Forward Shipping Fee cost in the case of cancelled due to Failed delivery.
children.name: fsf_seller_protection_fee_claim_amount

children.description:
7% VAT is charged for imported goods entering Thailand.

8% VAT is charged for imported goods entering Vietnam
children.name: vat_on_imported_goods

children.description: Name of the payment channel that buyer used in checkout.
children.name: payment_channel_name

children.description: Tenure information. This will have value if payment channel used has tenure information, such as credit card.
children.name: instalment_plan

children.description: By VN law, E-commerce platforms need to Withhold VAT tax applicable to all VN business household and VN individual sellers
children.name: withholding_vat_tax

children.description: By VN law, E-commerce platforms need to Withhold Personal Income Tax applicable to all VN business household and VN individual sellers
children.name: withholding_pit_tax

children.description: For VN Withholding Tax. This is the Tax Registration Number (TRN) from Seller Info (Business information) of the seller at the point of order creation
children.name: tax_registration_code

children.description: Order Processing Fee is the amount charged to sellers for every order created.
children.name: seller_order_processing_fee

children.description: The fee charged to the buyer for packaging materials
children.name: buyer_paid_packaging_fee

children.description: The discount provided by Seller/ Retailers for buyers who opt for trade-in.
children.name: trade_in_bonus_by_seller

children.description: Fulfilled by Shopee (FBS) Fee applied to this order, covering costs such as handling and storage and packaging. Only for PH Local Orders.
children.name: fbs_fee

children.description:
The respective fee amounts after the proportional rebate deduction.The total net commission fee applied to the order, calculated as the sum of all net commission fee items.

-only for BR local sellers.
children.name: net_commission_fee

children.description:
The respective fee amounts after the proportional rebate deduction.The total net service fee applied to the order, calculated as the sum of all net service fee items.

-only for BR local sellers.
children.name: net_service_fee

children.description:
Returns a breakdown of the net commission fees.

-only for BR local sellers.
children.name: net_commission_fee_info_list

children.description: The unique identifier of the commission rule applied to calculate the net commission fee.
children.name: rule_id

children.description: The net commission fee amount calculated based on the corresponding commission rule.
children.name: fee_amount

children.description: The display name of the commission rule for reference and readability.
children.name: rule_display_name

children.description:
Returns a breakdown of the net service fees.

-only for BR local sellers.
children.name: net_service_fee_info_list

children.description: The unique identifier of the service fee rule applied to calculate the net service fee.
children.name: rule_id

children.description: The net service fee amount calculated based on the corresponding service fee rule.
children.name: fee_amount

children.description: The display name of the service fee rule for reference and readability.
children.name: rule_display_name

children.description: The category of the service fee, indicating the type of service the fee is charged for.
children.name: category

children.description:
The shopee rebate borne by seller.

-only for BR local sellers.
children.name: seller_product_rebate

children.description: This is the portion of Shopee rebate borne by seller.
children.name: amount

children.description: This is the offset to gross commission fee, reducing it to the net value.
children.name: commission_fee_offset

children.description: This is the offset to gross service fee, reducing it to the net value.
children.name: service_fee_offset

children.description: [BR only]Final sum of pix discount of a specific order. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop.)
children.name: pix_discount

children.description: [BR only]This is the prorated value from pix discount due to adjustable RR. This field will only be updated when there is an adjustable RR. If it's a full RR or normal order, will response 0.
children.name: prorated_pix_discount_offset_return_items

children.description:
Includes both ads escrow top up fee (auto escrow top up to your ads balance) and technical support fee (charged by Shopee)

The actual fee type included in this field varies depending on the seller type and selling region, and may represent one of the following in Shopee Seller Center:

Ads Escrow Top-Up Fee

For local MY TH SG VN PH ID sellers and CNCB / JPCB / KRCB sellers selling in PH and ID

For JPCB sellers selling in SG, MY, TH, and VN

Technical Support Fee

For CNCB sellers selling in SG, MY, TH, and VN

Traffic Growth Fee

For KRCB sellers selling in SG, MY, TH, and VN
children.name: ads_escrow_top_up_fee_or_technical_support_fee

children.description: [TH only] Import Duty collected for imported goods entering Thailand.
children.name: th_import_duty

children.description: [Only for BR local shop]Represents the portion of Shopee voucher that is not consumed after fee offset.
children.name: remaining_voucher

children.description: The buyer payment info at order checkout moment. (snapshot value)
children.name: buyer_payment_info

children.description: The payment method used by buyer.
children.name: buyer_payment_method

children.description:
An additional service fee charged by shopee to Buyer at checkout. currently only applicable to ID region.
it is an initial value (will not be updated after RR/cancellation)
children.name: buyer_service_fee

children.description:
The tax amount paid by buyer.

currently this is a custom tax charged to CB orders in TW,CL,MX
children.name: buyer_tax_amount

children.description: The total amount paid by buyer at checkout moment.
children.name: buyer_total_amount

children.description: The subscription fee paid by buyer for ShopeeVIP.
children.name: shopeevip_subtotal

children.description:
The promotion provided by credit card.
it is an initial value (will not be updated after RR/cancellation)
children.name: credit_card_promotion

children.description:
The icms tax paid by buyer. this is only applicable to BR region
it is an initial value (will not be updated after RR/cancellation)
children.name: icms_tax_amount

children.description:
The import tax paid by buyer. 
it is an initial value (will not be updated after RR/cancellation)
children.name: import_tax_amount

children.description:
Transaction fee paid by buyer for the order. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. ). Most regions would have this fee charged to buyer at checkout depending on the fee rules applied in each region.
it is an initial value (will not be updated after RR/cancellation)
children.name: initial_buyer_txn_fee

children.description: The insurance premium paid by buyer. Currently only applicable to some regions like PH, MY, ID, VN, SG and TH it is an initial value (will not be updated after RR/cancellation)
children.name: insurance_premium

children.description:
The iof tax paid by buyer. 

it is an initial value (will not be updated after RR/cancellation)
children.name: iof_tax_amount

children.description:
Whether this order is paid by credit card. it's related to payment channel used at checkout.

Value: false,true
children.name: is_paid_by_credit_card

children.description:
The total item price paid by buyer at checkout.

it is an initial value and will not be updated after RR/cancellation
children.name: merchant_subtotal

children.description:
The voucher provided by seller to offset some value needs to be paid by buyer.

it is an initial value (will not be updated after RR/cancellation)
children.name: seller_voucher

children.description:
The shipping fee paid by buyer. (Only display for non cb sip affiliate shop. 

it is an initial value (will not be updated after RR/cancellation)
children.name: shipping_fee

children.description:
The shipping fee sst paid by buyer. Currently apply to MY region only 

it is an initial value (will not be updated after RR/cancellation)
children.name: shipping_fee_sst_amount

children.description:
The voucher provided by Shopee to offset the amount need to be paid by buyer.

it is an initial value (will not be updated after RR/cancellation)
children.name: shopee_voucher

children.description:
This is an amount of coin used by buyer at checkout to offset some amount to be paid. 

it is an initial value (will not be updated after RR/cancellation)
children.name: shopee_coins_redeemed

children.description: The fee charged to the buyer for packaging materials
children.name: buyer_paid_packaging_fee

children.description: The total amount of all trade-in bonuses applied to a transaction. This value is the summation of the bonuses contributed by all four parties: Shopee, Seller, Bank and Trade-in Partner.
children.name: trade_in_bonus

children.description: A fee charged to the buyer for the special handling and transportation required for items that exceed a specified weight or dimension threshold. Only for ID local seller
children.name: bulky_handling_fee

children.description: The discount provided by PIX (Only applicable for BR region)
children.name: discount_pix

children.description: The deposit fee paid by buyer of $0.10 per container as part of the SG Beverage Container Return Scheme mandated by the National Environment Agency (NEA). This will be an initial value and will not update after RR/cancellation.
children.name: bcrs_deposit
